name: @yohawing/three-mmd-loader
description: TypeScript-first ESM library for Three.js MMD loading and playback.

scripts.build: node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-mmd-assets.mjs && node scripts/copy-mmd-anim-wasm.mjs && node scripts/copy-bullet-mmd.mjs
scripts.render:visual:skinning: npm run build && node scripts/fixtures/generate-minimal-pmx.mjs --all-skinning && node scripts/fixtures/generate-minimal-vmd.mjs && node scripts/visual-regression/render-real-models.mjs --manifest scripts/visual-regression/skinning.manifest.json --data-root . --output-dir test-results/visual/skinning/current
scripts.render:visual:skinning:baseline: npm run build && node scripts/fixtures/generate-minimal-pmx.mjs --all-skinning && node scripts/fixtures/generate-minimal-vmd.mjs && node scripts/visual-regression/render-real-models.mjs --manifest scripts/visual-regression/skinning.manifest.json --data-root . --output-dir test/fixtures/visual-baselines/skinning
scripts.render:visual:generated-pmx: npm run build && node scripts/fixtures/generate-minimal-pmx.mjs --all-visual && node scripts/visual-regression/render-real-models.mjs --manifest scripts/visual-regression/generated-pmx.manifest.json --data-root . --output-dir test-results/visual/generated-pmx/current
scripts.render:visual:generated-pmx:baseline: npm run build && node scripts/fixtures/generate-minimal-pmx.mjs --all-visual && node scripts/visual-regression/render-real-models.mjs --manifest scripts/visual-regression/generated-pmx.manifest.json --data-root . --output-dir test/fixtures/visual-baselines/generated-pmx
scripts.render:visual:self-shadow: npm run build && npm run generate:fixtures:self-shadow && node scripts/visual-regression/render-real-models.mjs --manifest scripts/visual-regression/self-shadow.manifest.json --data-root . --output-dir test-results/visual/self-shadow/current
scripts.visual:smoke:generated-pmx: npm run render:visual:generated-pmx && npm run visual:report:generated-pmx
scripts.visual:smoke:generated-pmx:flip: npm run render:visual:generated-pmx && npm run visual:report:generated-pmx:flip
scripts.visual:smoke:self-shadow: npm run render:visual:self-shadow && npm run visual:report:self-shadow
